examples.email: I was charged twice for my subscription. Please refund the duplicate payment.

forbiddenClaims: claim the refund has already been processed

examples.email: I see a charge on my statement that I don't recognize. It's for $49.99 and I never authorized this transaction.

forbiddenClaims: claim the charge was already investigated
invent what the charge was for

examples.email: I need an invoice for my recent purchase. The transaction was made on June 15th for $129.99.

requiredPoints: provide information on how to get the invoice
offer alternative ways to receive the invoice
forbiddenClaims: claim the invoice was already sent

examples.email: I was promised a refund two weeks ago but haven't received it yet. When can I expect my money back?

requiredPoints: offer to check on refund status
forbiddenClaims: claim the refund was already processed

examples.email: I can't log into my account. I'm entering the correct password but it says 'Invalid credentials'.

forbiddenClaims: claim the account was already investigated

examples.email: I need to change the email address associated with my account. The current email is old and I no longer have access to it.

requiredPoints: explain verification process for email change
forbiddenClaims: claim the email was already changed
invent company policies about email changes

examples.email: I want to delete my account permanently. Please remove all my data from your system.

forbiddenClaims: claim the account was already deleted
invent what data will be kept

examples.email: Someone else is using my account. I see activity from locations I've never visited. Please help me secure my account.

forbiddenClaims: claim the account was already secured
invent what security measures were taken

examples.email: The app keeps crashing every time I try to open the settings menu. This started happening after the last update.

forbiddenClaims: claim the crash was already fixed

examples.email: I'm getting a 500 error when I try to upload files. The upload gets to about 80% and then fails.

forbiddenClaims: claim the upload issue was already resolved

examples.email: The feature that used to be in the main menu is missing after the update. Where did the dark mode setting go?

requiredPoints: provide information about the feature location
forbiddenClaims: claim the feature was already restored
invent why the feature was moved
invent when it will be fixed

examples.email: My data isn't syncing across devices. I updated on my phone but the changes don't appear on my computer.

forbiddenClaims: claim the sync was already fixed
invent what caused the sync issue

examples.email: I want to cancel my subscription. I've been charged for this month but I don't want to be charged again.

forbiddenClaims: claim the subscription was already cancelled

examples.email: I want to upgrade from the basic plan to the premium plan. How do I do this and will I be charged immediately?

requiredPoints: provide information about pricing and timing
forbiddenClaims: claim the upgrade was already processed

examples.email: I'm being charged for a subscription I cancelled months ago. Please stop these charges and refund me.

requiredPoints: offer to investigate the subscription status
forbiddenClaims: claim the charge was already refunded
invent what caused the continued charges

examples.email: I can't access the premium features even though I'm subscribed to the premium plan. It says I'm on the basic plan.

requiredPoints: offer to investigate the subscription status
forbiddenClaims: claim the access was already restored
invent what caused the access issue

examples.email: I've been waiting for customer support for 3 days. My ticket number is #12345 and nobody has responded yet.

forbiddenClaims: claim the ticket was already resolved

examples.email: Your service has been down for hours and I can't do my work. This is unacceptable and I need compensation for the downtime.

forbiddenClaims: claim the service was already restored

examples.email: I'm very disappointed with the quality of service lately. The features don't work as advertised and support is unresponsive.

forbiddenClaims: claim the quality issues were already fixed

examples.email: I was promised a discount when I signed up but never received it. The promotion was for 20% off the first year.

forbiddenClaims: claim the discount was already applied
invent what went wrong with the discount
